essence: Installs, maintains, and repairs wind turbines to keep renewable‑energy generation running safely and efficiently.

identity.title: Wind Turbine Technician
identity.summary: Climbs and services wind turbines, performs mechanical and electrical maintenance, troubleshoots faults, and ensures safe and reliable energy production.

salary.notes: Offshore specialists, rope‑access technicians, or senior turbine engineers can exceed £60k-£80k+.

qualifications: Training in electrical, mechanical, or renewable‑energy engineering
Working at height certification and safety training
Knowledge of turbine systems, hydraulics, and electrical components
Ability to diagnose and repair mechanical and electrical faults

lifestyle.description: Wind turbine technicians work on onshore and offshore wind farms, often in remote or coastal locations. The role involves climbing turbines, performing maintenance, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring safe operation. It suits individuals who enjoy hands‑on technical work, heights, travel, and contributing to large‑scale clean‑energy production.

habits: Works with engineers and renewable‑energy teams
